textByHash.0efe52419b5c68e15cf64c31a4e2e8ac5f3168dc: They put an end to time. They endangered the balance.
textByHash.3440a4ee2acf04b5fca462080e7992e4f9ede86d: For every life, there must be death.
textByHash.3581b9f5c22fced54145064932b83e71fa2679b0: You said the Altar was failing.
textByHash.3cd9f15f0d82448f1798d19778c5b8992fffc65f: To the south lies a battlefront.
textByHash.3d875934a31b5d817d1814ebd7038f98208b3a31: And your work will be done.
textByHash.40f38114c5d7318af9874bac56a19e7cb5c487b3: By the battlefront to the south.
textByHash.483685ee0ef004b8479fdc906389619175f165ec: The anima of this world, it is fed by life.
textByHash.49b4ec8243cc31f59219642da25e992ff4cce6da: And took on a new purpose.
textByHash.53cb9376d870dbbee9d32187a78451764f6304c6: So life must be kept in check.
textByHash.54c621a8388000a87e1aa1c8effdf94868678332: Perhaps our knowledge is beyond your understanding.
textByHash.73906263fc5d21e48e2aa31b6650c0f990d5d67a: They came to us. Two of them.
textByHash.8bcb345caa8288fd72811193e389f4aafb22df7c: More than many of the others.
textByHash.9243e9995b2f7a2b4e65c31dd98aa4d2a559702f: Upon death, a soul should leave this world.
textByHash.9f96ade485e00b611545140a37e66d4bb72bed89: But the balance is what matters.
textByHash.a49196557c5e16f0d2d125f8ee3dc90654560d23: But the soul was of one who died more recently.
textByHash.a8ce05dfff91ce3d294d1a96b32618951d7e1418: And now we shall help you.
textByHash.a9b5e90f311c6883f788e65f2b858cc53b9dd57c: Its existence is an affront to the balance.
textByHash.b03d7c394633b321e3eb94d50408aaea34ed50f6: Their work with souls has been useful in helping to maintain the balance.
textByHash.b4c647b129149a5190bb633bb159485c4e81dc71: Her time was running out. They wanted to give her more.
textByHash.b648f6d9bca6d669c2c0bfe084936eb42e57dd43: We prepared for such an outcome.
textByHash.b861346b13ceb34a43f9b19bcf7d532b99a36bd9: We could not stand by and watch.
textByHash.bad8fece03d73e113ecab4fe88438da927595ed2: His body was born long ago.
textByHash.e05f61a70c5b27abc0fb2167279c07e12e88d94f: And so we shall help you.
textByHash.fbf571348d12169a1f8100d6a22e1f54f4e67e9c: The Doors of Dinh are safe.
